languages.text: {n}В мертвенном звездном свете планета похожа на диковинный артефакт, таинственно мерцающий множеством острых граней. Вокруг нее закручивается тонкая сияющая спираль, то и дело меняющая направление: если присмотреться, можно различить, что ее составляют крохотные точки вражеских бомбардировщиков.{/n}

{n}In the dead starlight, the planet looks like a bizarre artefact whose many sharp facets glimmer mysteriously. A thin, gleaming spiral curls around the planet, changing direction from time to time. If you look closely, you can see that the spiral is composed of many minuscule dots — enemy bombers.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}В мертвенном звездном свете планета похожа на диковинный артефакт, таинственно мерцающий множеством острых граней. Вокруг нее закручивается тонкая сияющая спираль, то и дело меняющая направление: если присмотреться, можно различить, что ее составляют крохотные точки вражеских бомбардировщиков.{/n}

If you look closely, you can see that the spiral is composed of many minuscule dots — enemy bombers.{/n}

{n}In the dead starlight, the planet looks like a bizarre artefact, encrusted with a mass of gemstones, each burning a poisonous green. A thin, gleaming spiral curls around the planet, changing direction from time to time. If you look closely, you can see that the spiral is composed of many minuscule dots — enemy bombers.{/n}

If you look closely, you can see that the spiral is composed of many minuscule dots — enemy bombers.{/n}

{n}In the dead starlight, the planet looks like a bizarre artefact whose many sharp facets glimmer mysteriously. A thin, gleaming spiral curls around the planet, changing direction from time to time. If you look closely, you can see that the spiral is composed of many minuscule dots — enemy bombers.{/n}

languages.text: {n}死んだ星屑の中で、その惑星は奇妙な人工物のように見える。宝石の塊で覆われていて、宝石のそれぞれが毒の緑色に燃えている。細く光る螺旋が惑星を巻きつけていて、時々方向を変える。よく見ると、螺旋は小さな点でできていることがわかる。敵の爆撃機だ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In the dead starlight, the planet looks like a bizarre artefact, encrusted with a mass of gemstones, each burning a poisonous green. A thin, gleaming spiral curls around the planet, changing direction from time to time. If you look closely, you can see that the spiral is composed of many minuscule dots — enemy bombers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}死んだ星屑の中で、その惑星は奇妙な人工物のように見える。宝石の塊で覆われていて、宝石のそれぞれが毒の緑色に燃えている。細く光る螺旋が惑星を巻きつけていて、時々方向を変える。よく見ると、螺旋は小さな点でできていることがわかる。敵の爆撃機だ。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Bajo la luz de la estrellas muertas, el planeta parece un artefacto extraño, con numerosas facetas que desprenden un brillo misterioso. Una fina espiral reluciente rodea el planeta, cambiando de dirección ocasionalmente. Al mirar de cerca, ves que la espiral está compuesta de puntitos minúsculos. Son bombarderos enemigos.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In the dead starlight, the planet looks like a bizarre artefact whose many sharp facets glimmer mysteriously. A thin, gleaming spiral curls around the planet, changing direction from time to time. If you look closely, you can see that the spiral is composed of many minuscule dots — enemy bombers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Bajo la luz de la estrellas muertas, el planeta parece un artefacto extraño, con numerosas facetas que desprenden un brillo misterioso. Una fina espiral reluciente rodea el planeta, cambiando de dirección ocasionalmente. Al mirar de cerca, ves que la espiral está compuesta de puntitos minúsculos. Son bombarderos enemigos.{/n}

languages.text: {n}在死寂的星光下，这颗行星犹如一件奇诡造物，每一个锋利的棱面都闪烁着神秘的幽光。一道细长的闪光螺旋缠绕着行星，不时变换方向。仔细看去，那螺旋带竟由无数微小的光点组成——那是敌军的轰炸机群。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In the dead starlight, the planet looks like a bizarre artefact whose many sharp facets glimmer mysteriously. A thin, gleaming spiral curls around the planet, changing direction from time to time. If you look closely, you can see that the spiral is composed of many minuscule dots — enemy bombers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}在死寂的星光下，这颗行星犹如一件奇诡造物，每一个锋利的棱面都闪烁着神秘的幽光。一道细长的闪光螺旋缠绕着行星，不时变换方向。仔细看去，那螺旋带竟由无数微小的光点组成——那是敌军的轰炸机群。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Im toten Sternenlicht sieht der Planet aus wie ein bizarres Artefakt, dessen scharfe Facetten geheimnisvoll funkeln. Eine schimmernde Spirale windet sich um den Planeten und wechselt ab und an ihre Richtung. Bei genauer Betrachtung erkennst du, dass die Spirale aus zahllosen winzigen Punkten besteht ... feindlichen Bombern.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In the dead starlight, the planet looks like a bizarre artefact whose many sharp facets glimmer mysteriously. A thin, gleaming spiral curls around the planet, changing direction from time to time. If you look closely, you can see that the spiral is composed of many minuscule dots — enemy bombers.{/n}

Bei genauer Betrachtung erkennst du, dass die Spirale aus zahllosen winzigen Punkten besteht ... feindlichen Bombern.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ölü yıldız ışığında kalan gezegen, sayısız keskin yüzü gizemli bir şekilde parıldayan tuhaf bir esere benziyor. İnce, parıldayan bir sarmal, gezegenin etrafında kıvrılıp zaman zaman yön değiştiriyor. Yakından bakınca sarmalın birçok küçücük noktadan oluştuğunu görüyorsun. Bunlar, düşman bombardıman araçları.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}In the dead starlight, the planet looks like a bizarre artefact whose many sharp facets glimmer mysteriously. A thin, gleaming spiral curls around the planet, changing direction from time to time. If you look closely, you can see that the spiral is composed of many minuscule dots — enemy bombers.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ölü yıldız ışığında kalan gezegen, sayısız keskin yüzü gizemli bir şekilde parıldayan tuhaf bir esere benziyor. İnce, parıldayan bir sarmal, gezegenin etrafında kıvrılıp zaman zaman yön değiştiriyor. Yakından bakınca sarmalın birçok küçücük noktadan oluştuğunu görüyorsun. Bunlar, düşman bombardıman araçları.{/n}

languages.text: {n}À la lumière stérile des étoiles, la planète est semblable à un étrange artefact dont les nombreuses facettes luisent de façon mystérieuse. Une fine spirale étincelante s'enroule autour de l'astre, changeant parfois de direction. En regardant plus attentivement, vous réalisez que la spirale est composée d'une infinité de points minuscules : des bombardiers ennemis.{/n}
